name: postgres-target
description: PG migration target: 11 tables per design_postgresql_schema.md. CalcEngine -> SQL backend. Use Supabase MCP + postgres skill + ag-data-analytics-database-architect.

content: Skills installed via copy to ~/.claude/skills/NAME/ with SKILL.md at root. Antigravity bundles: cherry-pick individual skills from bundles/*/skills/ (whole marketplace is 1,407 skills - do not install all).
